---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case
**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing that this feature would address.

**Who would benefit?**
- [ ] End users (people viewing the radar)
- [ ] Data managers (people maintaining Excel files)
- [ ] Administrators (people deploying/configuring the tool)
- [ ] Developers (people extending the tool)
- [ ] Other: _____________

## 🔧 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working. Be as specific as possible:
- What would the user interface look like?
- How would users interact with it?
- What would be the expected behavior?

## 🔀 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? If so, please describe them and why they don't fully meet your needs.

## 📊 Examples / Mockups
If applicable, add:
- Screenshots or mockups of similar features from other tools
- Example data or configurations
- Links to relevant documentation or resources

## 🎨 Additional Context
Add any other context, considerations, or requirements:
- Performance implications
- Backward compatibility concerns
- Configuration requirements
- Integration with existing features

## 💪 Contribution
Would you be interested in contributing to this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I can help implement this
- [ ] Yes, I can help test this
- [ ] Yes, I can help document this
- [ ] No, but I'm happy to provide feedback

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I have checked existing issues and feature requests to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the use case and benefits
- [ ] I have considered how this fits with existing features
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
